string.name: auto_str_1303
string.value: MaterialLevel.GENTLE provides the most opaque material layer with lowest blur and transparency, maximizing text contrast. Suitable for entry page title bars where stability and readability are critical.

string.name: auto_str_1305
string.value: MaterialLevel.SMOOTH provides balanced frosted glass with medium blur and transparency. Suitable for content destination title bars, balancing text readability and material depth.

string.name: auto_str_1307
string.value: MaterialLevel.EXQUISITE has the strongest blur and transparency, revealing underlying content. Ideal for emphasis destination title bars seeking ultimate immersion.

string.name: auto_str_1308
string.value: This page title bar injects MaterialType.IMMERSIVE via official systemMaterialEffect, using different MaterialLevel values.

string.value: The framework requires background running permission to ensure long-running tasks are not interrupted in the background.

string.value: This is a very long text content. It demonstrates how the system notification panel collapses and expands long notifications. Users can pull down to view more details, making it ideal for displaying detailed error logs or descriptions.
